```shell
  @ val connection = GrpcSequencerConnection.tryCreate(sequencerUrl, customTrustCertificates = Some(certificate))
      connection : GrpcSequencerConnection = GrpcSequencerConnection(
        sequencerAlias = Sequencer 'DefaultSequencer',
        endpoints = https://127.0.0.1:32358,
        transportSecurity,
        customTrustCertificates
      )
```
